title: Terms & Conditions
summary: These Terms and Conditions govern access to and use of HHH Jobs, including its public pages, accounts, services, and related interactions.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of terms
sections.body: Effective Date: March 2, 2026. By accessing or using HHH Jobs, users agree to these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, you should not use the platform or its services.

sections.heading: 2. Eligibility and account information
sections.body: Users must meet the applicable age and eligibility requirements for account creation and use. By registering, you confirm that the information you provide is accurate, current, and complete.

sections.heading: 3. Account security
sections.body: Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their credentials and for activity that occurs under their account. You should notify HHH Jobs promptly if you believe your account has been compromised.
items: Provide truthful and current registration details
Protect account credentials from unauthorised use
Inform HHH Jobs promptly of suspected misuse

sections.heading: 4. Listings, applications, and platform role
sections.body: Employers must provide lawful, accurate, and non-misleading job information. Candidates must provide truthful and relevant application details. HHH Jobs operates as a platform that supports connections between parties but does not guarantee hiring outcomes, placements, or suitability.

sections.heading: 5. Acceptable conduct
sections.body: Users must engage with the platform and one another respectfully and lawfully. The following standards apply to all interactions:
items: Avoid harassment, abuse, discrimination, or deception
Do not upload unlawful, harmful, or misleading content

sections.heading: 6. Content ownership and permitted use
sections.body: Unless otherwise stated, platform content, branding, copy, graphics, and software are owned by HHH Jobs or its licensors. Users may access and use this content only as necessary for lawful use of the platform and may not reproduce or distribute it without permission.

sections.heading: 7. Service availability and limitation of liability
sections.body: HHH Jobs aims to provide a reliable platform but does not guarantee uninterrupted, error-free, or outcome-assured service. To the extent permitted by law, liability is limited in relation to matters such as:
items: Accuracy of third-party content or conduct
Losses arising from platform use, interruption, or reliance

sections.heading: 8. Suspension or termination
sections.body: HHH Jobs may suspend or terminate access where necessary to protect users, enforce policy, or comply with legal obligations, including situations such as:
items: Requirements arising from law, compliance, or safety

sections.heading: 9. Changes to these terms
sections.body: These Terms and Conditions may be updated from time to time. Revised terms will be posted on this page with an updated effective date, and continued use after that point indicates acceptance of the revised version.

sections.heading: 10. Governing law and contact
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws applicable to the jurisdiction in which HHH Jobs operates, subject to any mandatory legal requirements. Questions about these terms may be directed through the appropriate HHH Jobs contact route.
